settings.accountDesc: Log out to sign in with another account. Data is synced per account.
settings.walletsDesc: Manage wallets for recording income and expenses. Cannot delete wallets with transactions.
settings.incomeCategoriesDesc: Categories for recording income. Cannot delete categories with transactions.
settings.expenseCategoriesDesc: Categories for recording expenses. Cannot delete categories with transactions.
settings.currenciesListDesc: Add, remove, or drag to reorder. At least one currency is required. Default list can be replaced (e.g. only JPY for Japan).
settings.exportTransactionsDesc: Download your transactions as CSV for the selected date range. Default is the current month.

auth.tagline: Simple, clear income and expense tracking

income.empty: No transactions in the selected range.

expense.empty: No transactions in the selected range.

messages.passwordMinError: Password must be at least 6 characters.
messages.registerSuccess: Signed up successfully. Please verify your email if enabled.
messages.resetEmailSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.
messages.confirmDeleteWallet: Are you sure you want to delete this wallet?
messages.confirmDeleteCategory: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
messages.confirmDeleteCategoryWithTransactions: Category "{{name}}" has {{count}} transaction(s). They will be moved to "Uncategorized". Delete this category?
messages.confirmDeleteTransaction: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?
messages.categoryDeletedMoved: Category deleted. {{count}} transaction(s) moved to Uncategorized.
messages.currencyNeedAtLeastOne: At least one currency is required.
